global.description: The ad features a modern design with a purple gradient background and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with CoinBridge.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a calming atmosphere.

elements.label: Central geometric shapes
elements.description: An abstract arrangement of geometric shapes, including an oval and a square, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional overlay shapes in lighter shades of purple, adding depth and interest to the design.

elements.label: Additional geometric element
elements.description: A larger square shape in the center, providing a contrasting visual element.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The text 'CoinBridge' in bold, prominent font at the top, indicating the brand.

elements.label: Unidentified element
elements.description: A small, unclear element that does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The bold text 'CoinBridge' stands out prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting message
elements.description: The text 'Save with confidence Built for peace of mind' is displayed in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button text 'Start now' is positioned at the bottom, inviting user interaction.
